description:
Take your web app codebase and transform it into a cross platform desktop app with native functionality.


Features
- Ability to sync app configuration to a local todesktop-data.json file that can be tracked in version control. See here for more info: https://www.todesktop.com/docs/application/sync-app-data-with-a-local-file
Fixes
- Fix bugs related to Files. Specifically fixes for deletion, permissions issues and support for sub-folders
